title: helichrysum polhillianum
intro: Helichrysum polhillianum, also known as Mountain Everlasting or Hairy Everlasting, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to Lesotho and South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum polhillianum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
